zh.lifeSummary: 當Levinah Wright於1753年6月10日出生在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農時，她的父親Jabez Wright25歲，母親Martha Washburn25歲。她於1776年5月2日與Gershom Clark結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1840年5月14日在美國佛蒙特州溫莎女爵維亞黑斯費爾德享年86歲，埋葬在美國佛蒙特州溫莎女爵維亞黑斯費爾德阿斯庫特尼維爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Levinah Wright于1753年6月10日出生在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農时，她的父亲Jabez Wright25岁，母亲Martha Washburn25岁。她于1776年5月2日与Gershom Clark结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1840年5月14日在美国佛蒙特州溫莎女爵維亞黑斯費爾德享年86岁，埋葬在美国佛蒙特州溫莎女爵維亞黑斯費爾德阿斯庫特尼維爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a craftsman or maker of machinery, mostly in wood, of any of a wide range of kinds, from Middle English and Older Scots wriht, wright, wricht, writh, write (Old English wyrhta, wryhta) ‘craftsman’, especially ‘carpenter, joiner’. The term is found in various combinations (for example, Cartwright and Wainwright ), but when used in isolation it often referred to a builder of windmills or watermills. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Wrights
meanings: English: variant of Wright , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wrightsman
meanings: Probably English (although no longer found in Britain), meaning‘servant of the wright’ (see   Wright  ).

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Wrightson
meanings: English (northern England, especially Durham): patronymic from   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: McWright
meanings: Scottish or Irish: Gaelic patronymic with the English and Scots occupational term   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’. The name is possibly a part translation of   McIntyre  , which fully translates as ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: Wrightman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wright ‘craftsman’ (see Wright ) + man ‘man’, denoting someone who assisted a craftsman.

nameMeanings.name: Levinah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Lyubov, Galina, Sofiya, Asya, Gitya, Inessa, Khasya, Liliya, Lubov, Lyudmila, Masha, Raisa.  Jewish Faina, Khana, Sarra, Golda, Khanna, Tsilya.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from the Russian feminine form of   Levin  .

variants.name: Levin
meanings: This is the Armenian form of   Leon  , but it is used independently as a given name in the U.S., perhaps influenced by the fame of the rock musician,  Levon Helm  (  b. 1942  in Arkansas as Mark Lavon Helm;  d. 2012  in New York), drummer with The Band.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

historicEvents.title: Brass is Discovered
historicEvents.description: "In 1802, brass was identified in Waterbury, Connecticut. This gave the city the nickname ""The Brass City."" Brass dominated the city and helped to create the city. The motto of the city is Quid Aere Perennius, which means What is more lasting than brass? in Latin."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Connecticut History.Org- Birth of the Brass Valley

historicEvents.title: Making States Equal
historicEvents.description: The Missouri Compromise helped provide the entrance of Maine as a free state and Missouri as a slave state into the United States. As part of the compromise, slavery was prohibited north of the 36°30′ parallel, excluding Missouri.

historicEvents.title: Farmington Canal Opened
historicEvents.description: Farmington Canal spans 2,476 acres, starting from New Haven, Connecticut, and on to Northampton, Massachusetts. The groundbreaking for the canal was in 1825 and opened in 1829.
historicEvents.urlTitle: ConnecticutHistory.org- New England's Grand Ambition:The Farmington Canal

en.lifeSummary: When Levinah Wright was born on 10 June 1753, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United States, her father, Jabez Wright, was 25 and her mother, Martha Washburn, was 25. She married Gershom Clark on 2 May 1776. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 14 May 1840, in Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, United States, at the age of 86, and was buried in Ascutneyville Cemetery, Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Levinah Wright est née le 10 juin 1753, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Jabez Wright, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Martha Washburn, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Gershom Clark le 2 mai 1776. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1840, à Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, États-Unis, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Ascutneyville Cemetery, Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Levinah Wrightが1753年6月10日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンで生まれた時，父Jabez Wrightは25歳，母Martha Washburnは25歳であった。1776年5月2日にGershom Clarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1840年5月14日にアメリカ合衆国バーモント州ウィンドソルウエアスエルスフィールドで86歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バーモント州ウィンドソルウエアスエルスフィールドアスクウトニーヴィル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Ascutneyville Cemetery, Ascutney, Weathe: 미국 버몬트 주 윈드소르 웨더스필드 아스c트니빌 세멧리
ko.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌
ko.lifeSummary: Levinah Wright(이)가 1753년 6월 10일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jabez Wright(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Washburn(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1776년 5월 2일 Gershom Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1840년 5월 14일 미국 버몬트 주 윈드소르 웨더스필드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버몬트 주 윈드소르 웨더스필드 아스c트니빌 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Levinah Wright nasceu em 10 de junho de 1753, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jabez Wright, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Martha Washburn, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Gershom Clark em 2 de maio de 1776. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de maio de 1840, em Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermonte, Estados Unidos da América, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Ascutneyville Cemetery, Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermonte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Ascutneyville Cemetery, Ascutney, Weathe: аскутнивилл кеметири, витирсфиелд, виндзор, Вермонт, Соединенные штаты
ru.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United: лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Levinah Wright родилась 10 июня 1753 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Jabez Wright было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Washburn, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gershom Clark 2 мая 1776 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 14 мая 1840 г. в местности витирсфиелд, виндзор, Вермонт, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности аскутнивилл кеметири, витирсфиелд, виндзор, Вермонт, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Levinah Wright nació el 10 de junio de 1753, en Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, su papá, Jabez Wright, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Martha Washburn, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Gershom Clark el 2 de mayo de 1776. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1840, en Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Ascutneyville Cemetery, Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, Estados Unidos.
